payload: Continue to M10 and M11
Step 1: M10 LLM Phase 2 — 3 parallel tasks ready: openai.ts, anthropic.ts, tools.ts providers + scoped tool definitions. Read llm/types.ts and llamacpp.ts for interface contracts first.
Step 1 complete: M10 LLM Phase 2 — openai.ts, anthropic.ts, tools.ts created + factory/barrel updated. Commit 668f4db. Typecheck pass.
Step 1 M10 LLM Phase 2: all 4 sub-tasks verified, typecheck pass, code follows existing patterns, no blocking issues
Step 1 done+reviewed. Advancing to Step 2: M10 Phase 5b Autonomous Research (iterate.ts, research-program.ts, research-metrics.ts, gap-detector.ts)
Step 2 tasks materialized. Start with task-1774083771-bfd7 (research-program.ts) — pure TS, no DB deps, foundation for iterate.ts. Build order: 2.2 → 2.3 → 2.4 → 2.1
Step 2.2 research-program.ts complete. Pure TS ResearchProgram class with directive lifecycle management. Commit 32f1ec0. Typecheck pass.
Step 2.2 research-program.ts reviewed. Clean pure-TS implementation, all required interfaces/methods present, typecheck pass, no blocking issues.
Step 2.2 research-program.ts reviewed PASS. Next: Step 2.3 research-metrics.ts (evaluateIteration + shouldContinue convergence check). Then 2.4 gap-detector.ts, then 2.1 iterate.ts.

Step 2.3: Create webapp/src/lib/engine/research-metrics.ts — IterationMetrics interface (coverage_delta, confidence_delta, corroboration_score, novelty_score, proposals_this_iteration). evaluateIteration(before, after, proposals) computes deltas. shouldContinue(metrics, iteration, maxIterations) returns boolean — stops on diminishing returns or max iterations. Pure computation, no side effects.
Step 2.3: research-metrics.ts created — GraphSummary, IterationMetrics, evaluateIteration(), shouldContinue(). Pure computation, typecheck pass. Commit ac5915d.
Step 2.3 research-metrics.ts: PASS. Pure computation, all interfaces + functions match spec, typecheck clean, no blocking issues.

Step 2.3 research-metrics.ts PASS. Next: Step 2.4 gap-detector.ts — create webapp/src/lib/engine/gap-detector.ts with GapReport interface and detectGaps(casoSlug) function using parameterized Cypher queries.

Step 2.4: Create webapp/src/lib/engine/gap-detector.ts — GapReport interface (isolated_nodes, missing_relationships, low_confidence_clusters, suggested_questions) + detectGaps(casoSlug) using parameterized Cypher via readQuery, neo4j.int() for LIMIT. Task: task-1774083779-ae12

Step 2.4 gap-detector.ts complete. GapReport + detectGaps(casoSlug) with 3 parallel Cypher queries (isolated nodes, low confidence, missing rels). neo4j.int() for LIMIT. Typecheck pass. Commit 0af0f1a.
Step 2.4 gap-detector.ts PASS. 3 parallel Cypher queries, all parameterized, neo4j.int() for LIMIT, caso_slug filtered, typecheck pass. No blocking issues.

Step 2.4 gap-detector.ts PASS. Advancing to Step 2.1: iterate.ts (task-1774083765-365e) — autonomous research iteration stage. All dependencies ready (research-program, research-metrics, gap-detector). Builder: create webapp/src/lib/engine/stages/iterate.ts implementing StageRunner with kind=analyze, loop LLM+gap detection until convergence.

Step 2.1: Create webapp/src/lib/engine/stages/iterate.ts — IterateStageRunner (kind=analyze). Loops LLM calls with gap detection until convergence. Uses ResearchProgram, evaluateIteration+shouldContinue, detectGaps. See scratchpad 'Planner Advance — Step 2.1 iterate.ts detailed' for full builder instructions. Task: task-1774083765-365e
Step 2.1 iterate.ts PASS — implements StageRunner kind=analyze, core loop with gap detection+convergence, all imports valid, typecheck clean, no blocking issues

Step 2 complete (all 4 sub-tasks PASS). iterate.ts committed 5c7d55b. Advancing to Step 3: M10 Phase 8 Investigation Orchestrator (schema constraints, orchestrator core, dispatch, synthesis, priority). Build order: 3.1 schema → 3.3-3.5 modules → 3.2 orchestrator core.
Step 3.1: Add OrchestratorTask + OrchestratorState to schema.ts (2 unique constraints, 3 indexes) and types.ts (2 Zod schemas + types). See scratchpad for detailed builder instructions.
Step 3.1: Added OrchestratorTask + OrchestratorState — 2 unique constraints, 3 indexes in schema.ts; 2 Zod schemas + types in engine/types.ts. Typecheck pass. Commit ca4c602.
Step 3.1: OrchestratorTask + OrchestratorState — 2 Zod schemas in types.ts (11+9 fields), 2 unique constraints, 3 B-tree indexes in schema.ts. Typecheck pass. No blocking issues.

Step 3.1 PASS. Advancing to Step 3.3 dispatch.ts — create orchestrator/dispatch.ts with planBatch, dispatchBatch, collectResults, reassign. Build order: 3.3+3.4+3.5 (parallel) then 3.2 (depends on all).
Step 3.3: Create webapp/src/lib/engine/orchestrator/dispatch.ts — planBatch, dispatchBatch, collectResults, reassign. Task: task-1774085297-1f02. See scratchpad for detailed builder instructions.

Step 3.3 dispatch.ts complete. 4 functions: planBatch (in-memory from gaps+directives), dispatchBatch (UNWIND CREATE), collectResults (completed tasks DESC), reassign (SET assigned_to+status). All Cypher parameterized, neo4j.int() for numerics. Typecheck pass. Commit d64c15e.

Step 3.3 dispatch.ts PASS. 4 functions verified: planBatch (gaps+directives→tasks, correct field accesses), dispatchBatch (UNWIND CREATE, neo4j.int()), collectResults (completed DESC, LIMIT 500, Integer handling), reassign (parameterized SET). All Cypher parameterized. Typecheck pass. No blocking issues.

Step 3.3 dispatch.ts PASS. Advancing to Step 3.4 synthesis.ts. Build order: 3.4 synthesis.ts → 3.5 priority.ts → 3.2 orchestrator.ts. Builder instructions for 3.4: Create webapp/src/lib/engine/orchestrator/synthesis.ts with synthesizeResults(investigation_id, completedTasks) — corroboration, contradiction resolution, emergent patterns, dedup. Import OrchestratorTask from types.ts, readQuery/neo4j. All Cypher parameterized.

Step 3.4: Create webapp/src/lib/engine/orchestrator/synthesis.ts — findCorroborations, findContradictions, deduplicateProposals, synthesizeResults. Import OrchestratorTask from ../types, readQuery from ../../neo4j/client, neo4j from neo4j-driver-lite. All Cypher parameterized. See scratchpad for detailed Planner Advance — Step 3.4.

Step 3.4 synthesis.ts: 4 functions (findCorroborations, findContradictions, deduplicateProposals, synthesizeResults) + 4 interfaces. All Cypher parameterized, neo4j.int() for LIMIT. Typecheck pass. Commit b85b7c2.

Step 3.4 synthesis.ts: PASS. 4 functions + 4 interfaces match spec. All Cypher parameterized, neo4j.int() for LIMIT, caso_slug filter present, read-only/idempotent, no any types, YAGNI clean. Typecheck pass.
Step 3.4 synthesis.ts PASS. Advancing to Step 3.5 priority.ts: scorePriority, rebalance, detectDiminishingReturns, suggestNewFocus. After 3.5 → 3.2 orchestrator.ts (final sub-task).

Step 3.5 priority.ts: Create webapp/src/lib/engine/orchestrator/priority.ts with scorePriority (pure weighted score 1-10), rebalance (UNWIND Cypher reprioritize from synthesis), detectDiminishingReturns (pure trend check on metrics history), suggestNewFocus (Cypher find uncovered labels). Imports: OrchestratorTask from types, SynthesisReport from synthesis, IterationMetrics from research-metrics. All Cypher parameterized, neo4j.int() for LIMIT. See scratchpad for full spec.

Step 3.5 priority.ts complete: 4 functions (scorePriority pure weighted 1-10, rebalance UNWIND Cypher from synthesis corroborations, detectDiminishingReturns pure trend check last 3 iterations, suggestNewFocus Cypher uncovered labels). All Cypher parameterized, neo4j.int() on LIMIT/delta. Typecheck pass. Commit 8102067.

Step 3.5 priority.ts PASS: 4 functions (scorePriority pure weighted 1-10, rebalance UNWIND Cypher with neo4j.int delta, detectDiminishingReturns pure trend check, suggestNewFocus parameterized Cypher with caso_slug filter). All Cypher parameterized, no any types, YAGNI clean. Typecheck pass. Minor non-blocking: dead loop body for duplicates adjustment.

Step 3.5 priority.ts PASSED. All Step 3 dependencies met (dispatch 3.3, synthesis 3.4, priority 3.5). Advancing to Step 3.2 orchestrator.ts — main coordinator tying dispatch+synthesis+priority together. See scratchpad for builder instructions.

Step 3.2: Create webapp/src/lib/engine/orchestrator/orchestrator.ts (main coordinator calling dispatch+synthesis+priority) and index.ts (barrel re-exports). Final sub-task of Step 3. See scratchpad for detailed builder instructions.

Step 3.2: Created orchestrator.ts (runOrchestrationCycle — 7-step cycle delegating to dispatch/synthesis/priority) and index.ts (barrel re-exports). Step 3 fully complete. Typecheck pass. Commit 8d6751a.
Step 3.2 orchestrator.ts + index.ts: PASS. 7-step cycle correct, pure orchestration logic, no direct Cypher, barrel re-exports complete. Step 3 fully complete (5/5 sub-tasks PASS). Typecheck clean.
Step 3 FULLY COMPLETE (5/5 sub-tasks PASS). Advancing to Step 4 — M10 Phase 9: Remaining API Routes (gate/[stageId], audit, snapshots, orchestrator API routes).

Step 4.1 gate/[stageId] route: GET+POST handlers correct, follows existing patterns, appendEntry signature matches, no Cypher in route layer, typecheck pass (pre-existing errors only), no blocking issues.
Step 4.1 gate/[stageId] PASSED. Next: Step 4.2 audit route (GET audit entries with pipeline_state_id + limit params, import getChain from audit lib). 5 sub-tasks remain in Step 4.

Step 4.2: Create webapp/src/app/api/engine/[investigationId]/audit/route.ts — GET handler for audit entries. Query params: pipeline_state_id (required, 400 if missing), limit (optional, default 50). Import getChain from @/lib/engine/audit. getChain(pipelineStateId, limit) returns AuditEntry[]. Follow gate route pattern for async params + error handling. Typecheck must pass.
Step 4.2 audit route complete. GET handler with pipeline_state_id (required) and limit (optional, default 50) query params. Imports getChain from audit lib. Typecheck pass. Commit e4b3adb.
Step 4.2 audit route PASS. 54-line GET handler, pipeline_state_id required + limit optional, delegates to getChain (parameterized Cypher), follows existing patterns, typecheck clean.
Step 4.2 audit route PASS. Next: 4.3 snapshots route (GET list by pipeline_state_id/stage_id, POST create, DELETE by id). 4 sub-tasks remain in Step 4.

Step 4.3: Create webapp/src/app/api/engine/[investigationId]/snapshots/route.ts — GET (list by pipeline_state_id or stage_id), POST (create via captureSnapshot with PipelineState lookup), DELETE (by id). See scratchpad for detailed builder instructions.
